user.title: API Key

stop.title: Stop ID
stop.description:
Enter the stop ID you want to monitor.

You can search for stop IDs here:
{stop_lookup_link}

Scroll down to the 'Lookup' section, enter a stop name, enter your API key, and open the generated URL in your browser.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the API.

abort.already_configured: This stop and line combination is already configured.
